title: False Prophet
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to price surge exploitation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that performs manual price updates within a short timeframe before a significant price change.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that performs manual price updates within a short timeframe before a significant price change.
summary: Alpaca Finance's manual oracle system was exploited when the price of Thena token surged on Binance, leading to significant losses. A guard could have blocked manual price updates near price changes to prevent such exploits.
